name: PO Templates: Matrix vs Standard Templates
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Retail Express supports two different Purchase Order (PO) template types: "},{"text":"Standard (Normal) PO Templates","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"Matrix PO Templates","bold":true},{"text":". These templates are designed to support different product structures and purchasing workflows within the system."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A "},{"text":"Standard PO Template","bold":true},{"text":" is suited to products that are ordered as individual items, where each SKU is listed separately and quantities are entered per line. In contrast, a "},{"text":"Matrix PO Template","bold":true},{"text":" is designed for Style/Matrix products that have multiple variations, such as size, colour, or other attributes, and allows quantities to be entered using a grid-based layout."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"What Is a Standard (Normal) PO Template?"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A "},{"text":"Standard PO Template","bold":true},{"text":" is used for products that do "},{"text":"not","bold":true},{"text":" have matrix-style variations. Each product appears as a single line item on the purchase order."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/MJ0I6XKB0QVG/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/MJ0I6XKB0QVG/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":1064335,"width":2048,"height":1424,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FMJ0I6XKB0QVG%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2095,"dateInserted":"2026-01-28T08:12:25+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"\nWhen to Use a Standard PO Template"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Use a Standard PO Template when:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Products do not have size, colour, or style variations"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Each SKU is ordered individually"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Products are not created as Style/Matrix products"}]}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Key Characteristics"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"One row per product or SKU"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Quantity entered directly against each product"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Suitable for simple product catalogs"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Commonly used for accessories, services, or non-variant products"}]}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Example"}]},{"type":"table","children":[{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"th","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Product"}]}]},{"type":"th","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"SKU"}]}]},{"type":"th","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Quantity"}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Gift Holder"}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"CH200"}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"20"}]}]}]}],"id":"table-2-11","colSizes":[200,200,200]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"What Is a Matrix PO Template?"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A "},{"text":"Matrix PO Template","bold":true},{"text":" is designed for "},{"text":"Style/Matrix products","bold":true},{"text":" that have multiple variations such as size, colour, or other attributes. Instead of listing each SKU individually, quantities are entered into a "},{"text":"grid (matrix)","bold":true},{"text":" representing all product variations."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/RLLMP6HIKQ6Q/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/RLLMP6HIKQ6Q/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":371730,"width":1920,"height":1289,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FRLLMP6HIKQ6Q%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2096,"dateInserted":"2026-01-28T08:13:15+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"\nWhen and more efficient"}]}]}]}],"id":"table-0-23","colSizes":[200,200,200]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"How Retail Express Applies PO Template Layouts"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The PO template used depends on the "},{"text":"template selected by the user at the time of creating or configuring the Purchase Order","bold":true},{"text":". While product structure (standard vs style/matrix) determines "},{"text":"how products behave within a template","bold":true},{"text":", users must "},{"text":"manually choose the appropriate PO template","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Standard PO Templates","bold":true},{"text":" should be selected when ordering non-variant products."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Matrix PO Templates","bold":true},{"text":" should be selected when ordering Style/Matrix products with size, colour, or other variations."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For Style/Matrix products with a "},{"text":"large number of variants","bold":true},{"text":", the matrix layout will "},{"text":"automatically wrap onto additional lines","bold":true},{"text":" once the maximum supported variants per row is reached."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"📋 "},{"text":"Important: ","bold":true},{"text":"When using a Matrix PO Template, the system supports up to "},{"text":"12 variants per matrix row","bold":true},{"text":". If a style contains more than 12 variants, the matrix will "},{"text":"automatically wrap onto additional rows","bold":true},{"text":" for the same style."}]}],"appearance":"alert"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
